scripts.build: if [ -n "$CONVEX_DEPLOY_KEY" ]; then echo "[build] Deploying Convex functions" && bunx convex deploy -y --typecheck disable; else echo "[build] Skipping Convex deploy (CONVEX_DEPLOY_KEY not set)"; fi && next build
scripts.test:unit: bun tests/unit/ratingQuality.unit.ts && bun tests/unit/sidebarBehavior.unit.ts && bun tests/unit/adminSubtitleViewer.unit.ts && bun tests/unit/seo.unit.ts && bun tests/unit/browseFilters.unit.ts && bun tests/unit/subscriptionStatus.unit.ts && bun tests/unit/userWeights.unit.ts && bun tests/unit/analysisCopy.unit.ts && bun tests/unit/advisoryFeedback.unit.ts && bun tests/unit/affiliateTracking.unit.ts && bun tests/unit/streamingProviders.unit.ts && bun tests/unit/socialProof.unit.ts && bun tests/unit/convexImports.unit.ts && bun tests/unit/videoAnalysisErrors.unit.ts && bun tests/unit/newsletterAnalytics.unit.ts
